name: Command

spell.name: Command
spell.duration: until the end of the target's next turn

heightened.text: You can target up to 10 creatures.

spell.failure: The creature must spend the first action on its next turn to obey your command.
spell.critical_failure: The target must use all its actions on its next turn to obey your command.

text: You shout a command that's hard to ignore. You can command the target to approach you, run away (as if it had the fleeing condition), release what it's holding, drop prone, or stand in place. It can't Delay or take any reactions until it has obeyed your command. The effects depend on the target's Will save.
